title: Structure specification for the global SFC from-whom-to-whom (FWTW) matrix (CPIS-augmented re-run)
supersedes: prior matrix_spec.json that recorded imf_cpis bilateral as a HOLE / one-dense-column-only. That verdict is REFUTED: it was a US-vs-ISO3-USA query bug (HTTP-200-empty trap). CPIS bilateral cells are now OBSERVED and dense among the reporting subset.
reference_period: CPIS 2025-S1; BIS LBS 2025-Q4; TIC 2025-12; COFER 2025-Q4; Fed 2026-Q1 (mixed vintage; see per-block).
integrity_rule: Every cell carries source_basis in {OBSERVED-bilateral, ESTIMATED, UNVERIFIED-by-absence, HOLE}. OBSERVED-bilateral cites the contract + pulled file. ESTIMATED names the method below before use. UNVERIFIED-by-absence cites the contract finding that the publisher has no such series. HOLE cites the access friction or the structural non-report. No cell untagged; holes listed.

estimation_methods_named_before_use.name: RAS / Sinkhorn biproportional scaling
estimation_methods_named_before_use.definition: Alternating row-then-column proportional scaling of a nonnegative seed to row and column targets. APPLIED HERE in two distinct, separately-labeled passes recorded in ras_inputs.json: (i) a CPIS portfolio-block CONSISTENCY pass to the block's own margins (verifies seed margin-consistency; NOT an independent reconciliation, because CPIS supplies only the asset side and no independent portfolio-liability column marginal exists on disk for these areas); (ii) the BIS banking-marginal layer, where claims and liabilities are two INDEPENDENT marginals from the same source that do NOT net (the irreducible floor). Full inputs (row_targets, col_targets, seed sparse RCV, n_passes, tolerance, per-pass residual norms) persisted to build/model/ras_inputs.json so the residual is independently recomputable from disk. Verifier: build/results/dp2_recompute_check.py -> dp2_recompute_check.json.

estimation_methods_named_before_use.name: GCAP residency->nationality reallocation
estimation_methods_named_before_use.definition: Reallocate dollar/portfolio claims booked against the RESIDENCE of an offshore issuer (Cayman/BVI/HK) to the NATIONALITY of the ultimate issuer (notably China). Requires a counterparty-issuer nationality basis. CPIS does NOT supply it (COUNTERPART_COUNTRY is residency). The offshore-hub cells are therefore tagged residency-attributed and the China-by-nationality fraction of the offshore pool is recorded as a BOUNDED HOLE, not invented. Effect on the China channel reported in dp2_residual.json (direction upward; magnitude HOLE).

estimation_methods_named_before_use.name: counterparty-mirror
estimation_methods_named_before_use.definition: Where an economy does not report bilaterally, use a counterparty's reported claim/holding as the liability estimate. Noted as available but NOT used to fabricate the 176 CPIS non-reporter rows: non-reporting economies stay HOLE rows, not mirror-filled, to avoid inventing reporter rows.

structure.design_principle: An honest matrix bounded by what the 13 contracts deliver in machine-readable form. The NEW dense block is the CPIS portfolio-investment area x area layer (167 observed bilateral cells, 13 reporters x 14 counterparts, 2025-S1). It sits alongside the prior real blocks: Fed EFA US issuer-to-holder (585), TIC US-Treasury by country (36 + 1 publisher residual), BIS LBS USD bank positions (marginal layer), COFER reserve marginal, ECB QSA euro-area marginals. Density is uneven and reported per block; the matrix is NOT dense and is not claimed to be.

cpis_portfolio_block.row_dim: reporter / holder economy (ISO-3); 13 active reporters (VGB excluded: genuine reporter HOLE).
cpis_portfolio_block.col_dim: counterpart / issuer economy (ISO-3); 14 counterparts (VGB retained as counterpart-only).
cpis_portfolio_block.indicator: P_TOTINV_P_USD (total PI positions, USD), SECTOR=S1, COUNTERPART_SECTOR=S1, ASSET side (ACCOUNTING_ENTRY=A), 2025-S1
cpis_portfolio_block.honest_density: Dense among the reporting subset: 13 of 14 load-bearing economies report; the off-diagonal grid is fully populated except the 3 marked intra-block holes below. The 176 CPIS non-reporting economies are NOT given reporter rows.
cpis_portfolio_block.reporter_hole_not_invented: VGB (British Virgin Islands) files no CPIS as a reporter -> its row is a HOLE, left empty, NOT mirror-filled. The 176 non-reporters likewise get no fabricated rows.

structure.area_set_note: This is the CPIS load-bearing block area set (ISO-3). The BIS/TIC layers use the prior 2-letter area codes (US,CN,JP,GB,DE,FR,KY,HK,...) in their own pulled files; KY<->CYM, HK<->HKG, VG<->VGB are the same economies across the two coding schemes.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: holder-economy x issuer-economy, I2 debt + I3 equity combined (P_TOTINV_P_USD total), S1/S1, residency

load_bearing_cells_populated.note: USD millions; full set in matrix_assembled.json

intra_block_holes.reason: BVI does not file CPIS as a reporter (genuine structural non-report; code valid as counterpart). Row left empty, not invented.
last obs 2021-S2; no 2025-S1 vintage; seeded 0 (UNVERIFIED-by-absence for the current vintage).

offshore_hub_residency_status.RULE: Every CPIS-sourced cell is basis=residency. Offshore-hub cells stay residency-attributed and are NOT silently reallocated to issuer-nationality. The offshore-SPV issuer-nationality gap (CBS narrowed it; CPIS does NOT close it) is a MARKED, BOUNDED hole at the cell level so DP3 sees the masked-China pool as visible.

USA->CYM.nationality_status: NOT reallocated; masked-China pool; bounded HOLE
USA->CYM.note: dwarfs USA->CHN ($255,341mn) by ~11x; consistent with large Chinese-by-nationality issuance routed through Cayman residence.

USA->HKG.nationality_status: NOT reallocated; partial China-conduit masking; bounded HOLE

USA->VGB.nationality_status: NOT reallocated; offshore-SPV masking; bounded HOLE

USA->CHN.nationality_status: UNDERSTATED direct leg; true China-by-nationality = this + unquantified fraction of CYM/HKG/VGB pools. GCAP direction upward; magnitude HOLE.

caveats: ASSET (holder) side only (ACCOUNTING_ENTRY=A). Liability/mirror side is a known CPIS asymmetry, not closed here.
P_TOTINV combines debt + equity; not split here.

cell_basis_register.area: 36 named counterparty countries + publisher All Other
cell_basis_register.dimensions: country holder x US-government issuer x I2 debt, residency/custodial
caveats: Custodial/financial-center bias (BE/LU/KY/IE/CH/GB overstated vs beneficial owner) — the same residency-vs-nationality distortion GCAP addresses.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: all reporting banks (S2) USD claims (C) and liabilities (L) vs counterparty area, I1, residency
cell_basis_register.marginal_floor: claims and liabilities are independent marginals that do NOT net; the $711,157.7mn asymmetry (excl. US self-position) is the irreducible pre-RAS floor (dp2_residual.json).
caveats: Counterparty sector at L_CP_SECTOR=A only; no sector x sector at bilateral level.

cell_basis_register.dimensions: S1-S7 holder x S1-S7 issuer x I1-I6 instrument, residency
caveats: Corporate equities EXCLUDED from FWTW by publisher; some I3 cells UNVERIFIED-by-absence.
Negative levels excluded from RAS seed.
World aggregate only; MARGINAL, not a bilateral cell source.

cell_basis_register.area: EU member states x counterpart sector
cell_basis_register.dimensions: REF_SECTOR x COUNTERPART_SECTOR x instrument, ESA2010 residency
caveats: Heterogeneous units; XDC->USD conversion basis unverified; retained as available who-to-whom marginals, not merged USD cells.

cell_basis_register.friction: SAFE publishes as HTML/Excel; full counterparty table not machine-pulled. NOTE: CPIS now supplies CHN as a reporter (CHN->* row, 13 observed cells) on a residency basis, partially covering this need; SAFE's own bilateral table remains a HOLE.
cell_basis_register.reason_tag: HOLE (SAFE table) / partially superseded by CPIS CHN reporter row

cell_basis_register.finding: nbs/pboc are marginals-only; bilateral China cells UNVERIFIED-by-absence; marginal VALUES a HOLE (NBS JPG-only + WAF-403; PBoC netted).

cell_basis_register.friction: Goldhub gold-reserves Excel login-walled; not pulled.

cell_basis_register.finding: Counterpart who-to-whom dataflow empty for target non-EA advanced economies; marginals (DF_T720R_A) not pulled within effort cap. NOTE: CPIS now supplies JPN, GBR as REPORTERS (portfolio layer), covering part of this on a residency basis.

cell_basis_register.friction: EWN database manual Excel; not pulled. Would supply row/column control totals, not bilateral cells.

cell_basis_register.source_basis: OBSERVED (per contract) / not pulled this run
cell_basis_register.finding: bis_cbs supplies counterparty-nationality for the BANK-CLAIMS leg only; it narrows but does NOT close the offshore-SPV PORTFOLIO issuer-nationality gap. The CPIS offshore-hub portfolio masking (US->CYM etc.) remains a bounded HOLE at portfolio scope.

block_summary_counts.note: Per-cell census in dp2_residual.json. Headline change vs prior DP2: imf_cpis moved from HOLE to OBSERVED-bilateral (167 cells).
